programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Deacon Jim Miller: The Pious Assassin
programme.desc: His neighbours saw a devout family man. The last thing his victims saw was a shotgun aimed at their heads. If there's an outlaw who was born to kill its Deacon Jim Miller, the Bible-thumping psycho-killer.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Seth Bullock: Sheriff of Deadwood
programme.desc: In Deadwood, a mining camp swirling with violence and vice, Seth Bullock is the only stabilizing force standing in the way of utter chaos.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Peace and War
programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Warmonger
programme.desc: In the early 1980's, the next battlefield in the struggle between communism and democracy emerges, and it's in the United State's own backyard.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Killing Mussolini
programme.desc: A look at the once all-powerful Mussolini, friend of the Fuhrer, who ended his days hanging upside down like a grotesque animal carcass in Milan's Piazzale Loreto.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Doubleheader
programme.desc: Mark splits up his crew so they can conquer two jobs at the same time. Johnny and Tim take down a big tobacco barn that has plenty of antique material worth salvaging, while Graham and Alex tackle a log cabin that's still in great shape.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Saving More than Logs in Bulls Gap, TN
programme.desc: Mark and the guys go the extra mile to save the antique logs from a Tennessee home in distress. During the job they meet Larry, who grew up in the log cabin with no running water.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Larry Melton's Chance of a Lifetime
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders, after once saving Larry Melton's childhood home, do something they've never done before. They invite Larry to the Boneyard to help restore his family home. Mark also arranges a final surprise with some very special guests.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Finished Product
programme.desc: Mark Bowe visits finished cabins he helped build in Montana, Texas, South Carolina, West Virginia and North Carolina. Then, there's a big surprise waiting for him in Gatlinburg, Tennessee.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Georgia Mountain Treehouse
programme.desc: A couple sets out to create their dream treehouse retreat in Northern Georgia overlooking the Blue Ridge Mountains. Although the build calls for a mile-long, uphill trek with their materials, the end result is the ultimate childhood dream come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: A creative mountain biking group from Carbondale, Colorado builds a unique mountain retreat that doubles as their very own bike park feature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Windy Mountain
programme.desc: A snowmobile guide and his wife build an off-the-grid cabin by the river and mountains of their beautiful home state of Wyoming. The build includes a 272 square foot cabin with a small shop and garage. The team faces many challenges including snow.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bottle Island
programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace a life off the grid in Isla Mujeres, Mexico. He hires Richart Sowa and his son Eden to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Clearwater Camp
programme.desc: The team take on a cabin in Industry, ME, that hasn't been touched since the 1970's. Loads of issues arise once the snow melts and they start digging in.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Paws, Present and Future
programme.desc: Two animal lovers with a heart for rescuing dogs and cats call on Chase Morrill and his team to transform their West Gardiner cabin into a pet sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ho-Ho-Home!
programme.desc: Doug, aka Santa, and his wife Lois inherited a 1,250-square-foot cabin that's been in her family since 1958. With no major renovations since the 1970s, Chase and the team are excited to perform a Christmas miracle and transform this cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Restored: 1906 Arts and Crafts House
programme.desc: Brett is called upon to restore a historically significant 1906 arts and crafts home. He brings it back to its original glory by reintroducing the closed-in fireplaces, re-instating the floor plan and replacing the 1980s kitchen.

programme.title: Restored: 1926 French Normandy Cottage
programme.desc: A cottage build in 1926 was a severely neglected rental for 30 years. Brett deals with a leaky roof, rotten windows, missing floorboards and damaged walls.

programme.title: Restored: 1927 Arts and Crafts Bungalow
programme.desc: A daughter and mother call on Brett to restore a 1927 arts and crafts house that's lost some character over the years. While restoring the home, Brett unexpectedly discovers a hidden masterpiece.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s Modern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch in Redlands, CA, for a couple who recently inherited the home from her grandfather.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics III: Creole in a Bowl
programme.desc: Alton looks at the cultures that influenced New Orleans beans and rice.

programme.title: Good Eats: Undercover Veggies
programme.desc: To tempt his niece into eating her vegetables, Alton sneaks them into several meals.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics VII: Don't Be Chicken of Dumplings
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes on the classic American soup that divides the country, and his family.

programme.title: Good Eats: It's a Pan, It's a Dish, It's Paella
programme.desc: Alton Brown demystifies the Spanish pan and the rice dish for which it is famous.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Tournament of Champions: Flay vs. Stone
programme.desc: Aussie Chef Curtis Stone enters Kitchen Stadium to take on Iron Chef Bobby Flay in a fiery battle to the finish.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Morimoto Vs. Hines
programme.desc: Chef Makoto Okuwa, a former sous chef to Iron Chef Morimoto enters Kitchen Stadium for the first time as a challenger to Iron Chef Michael Symon. Will Okuwa break under the pressure of leading his own team?

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Guarnaschelli Vs. Sutherland
programme.desc: Minnesota chef Justin Sutherland brings his contemporary Southern cuisine to Kitchen Stadium in an attempt to fleece Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Zakarian vs. Gallante
programme.desc: Geoffrey Zakarian faces off against Shea Gallante, executive chef at Ciano in New York.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Food Fantasy
programme.desc: Imagination roams free at these amazing dining spots.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Americana
programme.desc: Classic American fare gets the royal treatment at these extraordinary spots. Heavy-Metal inspired burgers piled high with the works and mouth-watering, stick-to-your-ribs barbecue in Brooklyn are featured.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Great Spaces
programme.desc: Take a tour of the most unique places and spaces in dining today. From a food truck serving the most delectable Korean/Mexican dishes on four wheels, to a LEED-certified bowling-alley-come-music-venue boasting it's own special Blue Ribbon menu.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet and Savory
programme.desc: Desserts such as donuts that raid the savory spice cabinet, roasted pepper gelato.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Small Bites
programme.desc: Stacked baklava and creative candies from Queens and Brooklyn, tiny treats.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Chocolate
programme.desc: If a love for chocolate can be described as a religion, we have found the ultimate places of worship that claim devotion to little else. Atop the shrine to this beloved ingredient sits a collection of playful chocolate confections.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a bite of Chicago's humble, hearty and world-renowned food scene. From juicy rib tips to zesty Polish sausages to experimental and edible works of art, Chicago's eats stay true to its roots.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Trinidad And Tobago
programme.desc: Andrew samples the island flavors and culinary mashups of Trinidad and Tobago. These islands have a passion for food and life, featuring dishes like curried crab with dumplings, crispy fried shark sandwiches and soft and silky flatbreads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Pigging Out
programme.desc: From sweet and salty Cuban sandwiches and zesty whole hog barbecue to mild kielbasa and melt-in-your-mouth cured ham, Andrew Zimmern explores all the best ways we pig out on the world's most popular meat - pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mumbai
programme.desc: Andrew unveils Mumbai's multicultural flavors and addictive ingredients. A city built on chaos and hard work, Mumbai showcases its history through its delicious eateries. The city's edible icons include deep-fried fish and prawns and saucy goat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Boston
programme.desc: American history is illustrious in Boston, Massachusetts, and here, Andrew explores its legendary cuisine: from New England clam chowder and scrod to the hotel where Boston cream pie and Parker House rolls were invented.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New York City
programme.desc: New York City is a melting pot of various ethnicities and culinary fusion. Andrew explores the iconic foods from the Big Apple like mile-high pastrami sandwiches, bagels and lox, pizza by the slice and the American hamburger.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: A Tall Order Of Cakes
programme.desc: Molly goes under the big top to create a cake design that will raise funds for a local charity. Ben uses his skills as a former tattoo artist to make a permanent good impression for his clients.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Prince Of Cakes
programme.desc: Prince Charles gives his royal approval to Phil and Christine's cakes. While Eloise challenges herself with a cake of gigantic proportions, Molly shows Manchester United pride in her latest cake creation.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Beer, Bling And Spinning Cakes
programme.desc: A brewery celebration calls for kegs made of cake that actually pour beer, and a huge, edible sombrero is filled with food and flames!

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Big Ben and Wearable Hat Cakes
programme.desc: London comes to Las Vegas in a wedding shower creation that's ready for high tea, then cake and ice cream get a whole new meaning. Plus, a spinning masterpiece shines like crystals but is completely edible.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cupcakes for the Queen
programme.desc: It will be a British Invasion of the sweet kind when four English bakers fight for the chance to have their cupcakes featured at an exclusive party celebrating Queen Elizabeth's Diamond Jubilee.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Friend or Foe

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Driven to Tears/ Rule of Dumb

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Born Again Krabs/ Safety Freak SpongeBob
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs refuses to let SpongeBob throw away a mouldy Krabby Patty under the grill.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sand Castles in the Sand/ Shell Shocked
programme.desc: A friendly day of building sand castles soon turns into all out war when SpongeBob and Patrick use their sand creations to battle each other. When Gary's shell breaks, SpongeBob tries to find him a replacement.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Sponge/ Sing a Song of Patrick
programme.desc: Spongebob becomes popular at the Krusty Krab; Spongebob helps Patrick get radio play.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Big Sister Sam / Perfect Chemistry
programme.desc: Patrick's big sister Samantha comes for a visit; Sandy and Plankton bond over their shared love of science.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Picture Day/ Pat No Pay/ Blackjack
programme.desc: SpongeBob must attend Picture Day for the Boating School Year Book; Patrick steals.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Buried in Time/ Enchanted Tiki Dream
programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a dream world for Squidward; The gang is caught in a time capsule.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Are You Happy Now?
programme.desc: Squidward tries to recover his happiest memory.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Help Wanted/ Reef Blowers/ Tea at the Treedome
programme.desc: Bob applies at the Krusty Krab; a mess ends up on Squidward's lawn; meeting Sandy for tea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Missing Identity/ Plankton's Army
programme.desc: SpongeBob loses his nametag; Plankton is after the Krabby Patty Secret Formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Rocket/ Squeaky Boots
programme.desc: Bob and Pat accidentally launch Sandy's rocket ship into space; boots in lieu of pay.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hooky/ Mermaidman and Barnacleboy II
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob ignore warnings; SpongeBob follows superheroes for a day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dunces and Dragons
programme.desc: After a freak jousting accident at a Medieval Times restaurant, SpongeBob and Patrick are transported to a medieval version of Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chimps Ahoy/ Ghost House
programme.desc: The Chimpanzee beneficiaries of Sandy's undersea tree dome are paying a visit to see what progress she has made with her inventions. The Flying Dutchman takes up residence at SpongeBob's house.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Great Chipmunk Detective/ Guitar Hero
programme.desc: When Miss Miller gets robbed, Eleanor and Theodore promise to find the culprit and bring them to justice. Alvin begrudgingly agrees to teach Miss Smith guitar, but she won't reveal why she so desperately needs to learn.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Time Flies/ Prank Calls
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany are convinced Simon has vanished back in time and go all out in an attempt to bring him back. A prank call by Alvin gets out of hand when the person on the other end of the line vows to track him down.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mutiny/ Reality or Not
programme.desc: Desperate to avenge last year's loss, The Chipmunks argue over who is best suited to lead them to victory. Later, Alvin is tired of seeing his celebrity status overshadowed by Reality TV stars. So, he decides to become one.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Late Fee/ Bullhop
programme.desc: The endless craziness of New York complicates the returning of a DVD; the Turtles try to help a distressed mutant.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Man vs. Sewer/ The Mutant Menace
programme.desc: Ralph is separated and left alone during the Turtles' lazy river ride through the sewers. And, all of New York is turned against the Turtles after failed attempts to do good deeds.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Turtledega Nights: The Ballad of Rat Man/ The Ancient Art of Ninja Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Splinter enters the Turtle Tank in a demolition derby. And, Splinter teaches his sons the Art of Ninja Concealment.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: You Got Served/ How to Make Enemies and Bend People to Your Will
programme.desc: Leo and Mikey get sidetracked by a brotherly competition while helping Señor Hueso. And, Baron Draxum struggles to move up in the Foot Clan.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mystic Mountain/ Candy Confessions
programme.desc: Dave is concerned that the Chipmunks have become too obsessed with their latest video game. Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him a limited edition skateboard. But, Theodore uses the money to buy candy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: We're The Chipmunks/ Save the Dance
programme.desc: When a new boy band, 'The Hipmunks,' tries to steal the spotlight, the Chipmunks are forced to compete in a battle of the bands.The Principal gives Alvin and Derek an ultimatum. If they fight, the school dance will be canceled.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Sky Police/ Father's Day Parade
programme.desc: Police Chief Wheeler announces the formation of the 700 million dollar Sky Police. Police captain, Tom Bennett, gets a call that his wife has gone into labor early.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: 3, 2, 1/ Shirley Keeper

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: A Fish Story!
The Adventures of Kid Danger: The Sushi Sitter/ Cheer Beast

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Tiny Toddler/ Magical Beefery Tour
programme.desc: After misplacing the shrink ray, Captain Man and Kid Danger have to battle The Toddler to win it back. Captain man and Kid Danger find a golden pickle in their burger which wins them a private tour of the secretive factory where Beefo's Burgers are made.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: The Wahoo Punch Bro/ Pink Rocket
programme.desc: When the Wahoo Punch Bro is running amok through Swellview, Captain Man and Kid Danger must find a way to stop him. When Mitch Bilsky mocks Henry's kiddie motor scooter, Ray sets up a race between Henry and Mitch to prove whose transportation is faster.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Snooze Pods/ Sticky Vicky
programme.desc: Jasper becomes trapped in a dream using one of Schwoz's Snooze Pods. Henry's field trip to the Museum of Celebrity Garbage is cut short by the arrival of Sticky Vicky.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Mad Wax/ Fails
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger are attacked by wax figures at the Celebrity Wax Museum. And, Brad posts embarrassing videos of Captain Man and Kid Dangers until they turn him invisible again.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies
programme.desc: When Bill grows a huge watermelon, Cricket invites the local news to see the mega melon. Cricket stands up to the cyberbullying of three online gamers known as the Cyber Knights.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Movie: Astro Boy

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Chronicles of Meap
programme.desc: Space pod crashes carrying an unbearable cute alien, Meap; another adventure begins.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Meapless in Seattle
programme.desc: Meap returns to save Phineas and Ferb from his nemesis Mitch, whose real mission is to take control of all of alien-kind, putting Meap's world in danger.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Knot My Problem/ Mind Share
programme.desc: Phineas and the gang switch bodies with alien tourists for a free intergalactic vacation, only to realize they were actually duped and are now stranded on the alien planet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Return Policy/ Imperfect Storm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb assemble a crazy array of batting cage and Doof uses an inator to return things to the store. Mom gets a backyard makeover and calls Candace to come see it, while Doof makes a Have-A-Bad-Day-Inator to rain out a tea party.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fred the Fugitive
programme.desc: Fred's invisibility function on his suit glitches during patrol.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight
programme.desc: Now fugitives, Big Hero 6 lay low as the SFPD searches for them. However, new villain Hardlight shows up hoping to challenge Big Hero 6 to a real-life videogame duel.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Crush, Chop, and Burn, Part I
programme.desc: When 14 year old Leo moves into his new stepdad’s mansion, he snoops around and discovers Adam, Bree, and Chase, three bionic siblings living in a lab beneath the house.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Crush, Chop, and Burn, Part II
programme.desc: After discovering the mayhem his Lab Rats have caused at the high school, Davenport decides to send them away to a remote secret lab.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Leo's Jam
programme.desc: When Leo needs help asking a girl to the school dance, Adam and Chase step in to help, but the plan backfires when she falls for the wrong brother. The boys decide to settle their differences on the dance floor and each show off their best moves.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Rats on a Train
programme.desc: The Lab Rats get their first mission to stop Davenport's hi-tech super fast train from speeding out of control. When they discover that Leo accidentally discarded the braking system they were supposed to install, they are forced to improvise.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Birthday Fail
programme.desc: Adam, Bree, and Chase, who have never had a birthday party of their own, get so caught up in throwing a surprise party for Leo that they forget to invite him to it.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Death Spiral Smackdown
programme.desc: Leo teams up with Adam in a school fitness challenge, hoping that Adam's bionic powers will be his secret weapon. But the plan backfires when they end up going head-to-head in the finals.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Can I Borrow the Helicopter?
programme.desc: After a few failed attempts at impressing Janelle, Leo borrows Davenport's high-speed helicopter to take her on a daring date. Meanwhile, Bree decides to move out of the lab and into her own room.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Back From the Future
programme.desc: Leo, from seven years in the future, arrives in present day to prevent Adam, Bree and Chase from going on a mission from which they won't return.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Chip Switch
programme.desc: Adam, Bree and Chase defy warnings from Davenport and swap bionic chips with bad results.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Drone Alone
programme.desc: When Tasha and Davenport go on a vacation, Leo must make sure that nothing happens to his stepdad's prized possessions.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Chore Wars
programme.desc: Adam, Bree and Chase learn about chores and earn an allowance for the first time, then decide to host a yard sale to raise more money.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Dude, Where's My Lab?
programme.desc: Tasha takes the entire family on a nice tech free beach weekend in the RV, but when Davenport discovers a solar flare headed in the Earth's direction, he secretly enlists the help of the Lab Rats.

programme.title: Marvel's Avengers: Secret Wars: Beyond

programme.title: Marvel's Avengers: Secret Wars: Underworld
programme.desc: As they search for the Bifrost and a way to undo Battleworld, the Avengers must battle the Enchantress.

programme.title: Marvel's Avengers: Secret Wars: The Immortal Weapon

programme.title: Finding Your Roots: This Land Is My Land
programme.desc: Henry Louis Gates, Jr. reveals the unexpected family trees of entertainer Queen Latifah and actor Jeffrey Wright, redefining their sense of the black experience — and challenging preconceptions about America’s past.

programme.title: Sit and Be Fit: Imagining Resistance
programme.desc: Mary Ann shows three way to push up from a chair and uses imaginary resistance to strengthen muscles.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Second Chance/ Arthur and the Whole Truth
programme.desc: With the help of a little time travel, Buster turns back the clock to see what his life would be like if he were a genius. Arthur isn't happy when he discovers that Buster has been telling him some white lies.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go!: Moon Circus/ Every Day Is Earth Day
programme.desc: Carrot is about to turn 250 Bortronian years old, and the kids have set up a backyard circus to help him celebrate. It's Earth Day, and the kids are preparing posters for the big community celebration at the DSA.

programme.title: Nature Cat: Ocean Commotion
programme.desc: A day of celebration has gone from joyous fun to total sadness as Nature Cat accidentally drops Mr. Chewinsky, Hal's favourite chew toy, down the storm drain.

programme.title: The Rhythm and Roots of Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur’s Great-Grand Uncle Theo is celebrating his 85th birthday, so the Reads (and Buster) are off to Ohio to join in the festivities. D.W. and Arthur learn that farm life is a little different than life in Elwood City.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum: I Am Jackie Robinson/ I Am Anna Pavlova
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Xavier, Yadina, & Brad as they travel back to meet famous heroes.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: Queen for a Day/ Jolly Special Friend
programme.desc: In London, Carmen loves the idea of being a queen at Buckingham Palace, but finds out that royal life is more complicated than it looks.

programme.title: Peg + Cat: The Birthday Cake Problem/ The Doohickey Problem
programme.desc: Peg and Cat make a birthday cake for Jonah and his friends, but first they need to figure out how old he is going to be.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Calm at the Restaurant/ Calm in Class
programme.desc: The Tiger Family goes to the restaurant for taco night with Jodi and Dr. Plat. Daniel and Jodi find out that there are times to be silly and times to be calm. Later Music Man Stan comes to school for a special musical story with the class.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Welcome to Sesame Hospital
programme.desc: Rosita, Abby, and Telly play hospital and pretend to be a doctor, nurse, and x-ray technician. Chris pretends to be their patient and they help heal his funny bone.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Drawing Noses/ Pinkalicious on Ice
programme.desc: Pinkalicious loves drawing faces, except for noses - which she finds really hard to draw; Pinkville's Great Skate is coming up, but Pinkalicious is having trouble learning the finale move.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Puddings
programme.desc: For their Signature challenge, the bakers go all out with two types of sponge puddings. In the Technical, they face Queen of Pudding, a recipe direct from the archives of Mary Berry. A Showstopper strudel stretches them to their limits.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots: This Land Is My Land
programme.desc: Henry Louis Gates, Jr. reveals the unexpected family trees of entertainer Queen Latifah and actor Jeffrey Wright, redefining their sense of the black experience — and challenging preconceptions about America’s past.

programme.title: Country Music: The Hillbilly Shakespeare (1945 -1953)
programme.desc: See how the bluegrass sound spreads in post-war America, and meet honky-tonk star Hank Williams, whose songs of surprising emotional depth are derived from his troubled and tragically short life.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Parent's Nightmare
programme.desc: An 8-year-old boy disappears from school and his mother receives a ransom request. When surveillance footage shows that the boy recognized his abductor, detectives work with his mother and her ex-husband to find and arrest the suspect.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Townhouse Incident
programme.desc: Benson is taken hostage when she tries to stop a violent home invasion.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Unholiest Alliance
programme.desc: When one of their own is implicated in a coverup, the SVU struggles to unravel a sex trafficking operation deeply rooted in government offices, the police department and the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Terrorized
programme.desc: A young boy is found wandering alone in Central Park, and the search for his parents leads to startling evidence of a planned mass-casualty event in the city.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Guardian
programme.desc: Fin investigates a man's claim that his sister was gang raped.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Mama
programme.desc: An Alzheimer's patient claims she was raped but her illness casts doubt on the case. Fin's sergeant orders come in.

programme.title: Dare Me: Rapprochement
programme.desc: Beth reasserts her authority by enticing the squad to a wild, adult party at the Playland Motel.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Pop
programme.desc: A young boy is found dead on a park carousel after being dropped off by his uncle. When detectives learn he was beaten to death, they suspect it may be the school bully, but the investigation leads them to a gambling ring.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Bombshell
programme.desc: When a man is found dead in a parking garage, detectives learn that he may have been hiding a secret life. When they go undercover at a swingers club, they meet a popular woman and her jealous boyfriend.

programme.title: Dare Me: Rapprochement
programme.desc: Beth reasserts her authority by enticing the squad to a wild, adult party at the Playland Motel.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Producer's Backend
programme.desc: Amaro reports to the scene of a car crash where a Hollywood starlet tries to flirt her way out of an arrest. Amaro tries to investigate the starlet for statutory rape, but Benson believes there is an underlying issue.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Holden's Manifesto
programme.desc: A bike messenger creates a video diary of his trouble with women. Talk soon escalates to action, and the SVU scrambles to find his manifesto before he commits another violent act.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Glasgowman's Wrath
programme.desc: Young friends sneak into the woods to search for a mythical creature. When only one of them returns, gravely injured, the SVU team work to locate a suspect and to distinguish the fantasy stories from the reality stories.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Intimidation Game
programme.desc: When a female employee is assaulted at a gamer convention, Detective Tutuola investigates the crime. A female game developer refuses to delay her game launch, and the cops must 'level up' to protect her.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Wrong Side of the Bars
programme.desc: Antonio's son was kidnapped, and he has a feeling the Columbian drug gang is to blame. The Columbian gang leader is being held in jail and suggests his release may trigger the release of Diego.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chin Check
programme.desc: After the discovery of large amounts of cop killer ammo, the Intelligence Unit is in a quest to find the source.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Now Is Always Temporary
programme.desc: The intelligence squad is in hot pursuit of a counterfeiting ring as Atwater and Burgess come across something unexpected in a hoarder's home.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Thirty Balloons
programme.desc: A run in with a psychotic woman leads the Intelligence Unit to discover a drug smuggling operation which has put several lives in peril.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Comic Perversion
programme.desc: A popular comedian is faced with student protesters after a set at Tompkins Square University. His demeaning jokes about women and rape become more serious when a student is assaulted by two of his fans.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Conventions
programme.desc: Voight and Antonio enlist the agents of the Special Victims Unit to help track down the culprit of a series of rapes and murders. Burgess has the opportunity to prove herself to Intelligence.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Chicago Crossover
programme.desc: Voight, Lindsay and Halstead track a child-pornography victim to his last-know whereabouts in New York City, where Benson and the SVU squad get a new lead. Lindsay discovers someone from her past is involved and hopes to find the ringleader.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: They'll Have to Go Through Me
programme.desc: The final part of the crossover event finds our intelligence unit joined by detectives from the SVU to help solve the pedophile case. Ruzek and Amaro, along with Halstead and Antonio continue to hunt for the link to foster care and child trafficking.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Number of Rats
programme.desc: Benson travels to Chicago to help Voight and intelligence with a rape/ murder case that is eerily similar to a case from New York a decade ago. She calls in Fin and Amaro to assist.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Daydream Believer
programme.desc: Benson and Voight lead their teams to investigate a rape/ murder case. Forced to release their main suspect, the CPD joins SVU in New York in pursuit of Yates.

programme.title: Movie: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: The Anti-Villain League has recruited Gru to help deal with a powerful new super criminal.

programme.title: Movie: Moana
programme.desc: When a great danger is awakened, a young teenager leaves her peaceful home on a journey to find the demigod Maui. She discovers her sailing skills and Maui agrees to help her become a wayfinder like her ancestors. They face impossible odds together.

programme.title: Movie: Coco
programme.desc: A boy with a passion for music comes from a family that forbids it, despite a deceased relative being one of Mexico's most revered musicians. While trying to prove his himself, he unwittingly ends up in the colourful and vibrant Land of the Dead.

programme.title: Movie: Grown Ups
programme.desc: Five good friends and former teammates reunite after their high school basketball coach passes away.

programme.title: Party of Five: Pilot
programme.desc: When ICE deports their parents, life for the five Acosta siblings is turned upside down. Oldest son Emilio puts his music career on hold to move back home and take care of his siblings. Their challenge is to stay together as a family.

programme.title: Breaking Bad: Gray Matter
programme.desc: Skyler organizes an intervention for Walter to get chemo; Jesse attempts to go straight.

programme.title: Breaking Bad: Crazy Handful of Nothin'

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Poisonous Affair

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Deep Space Air
programme.desc: While doing scientific research, Michael makes things heavy with some otherworldly air. Then, at a bakery, the new rolls are so light, they defy gravity. Also, as a golf instructor, Michael gets caught by the ultimate sand trap.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fishguise
programme.desc: At a local copy shop, Michael introduces a print-by-hand technique, and at a bait tackle shop, he unveils the latest fish fashion trends. Finally, at an office, Michael pulls a switcheroo and the new temp has no idea who's the boss.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Framing Canon
programme.desc: While working at a frame store, Michael becomes a piece of art. Then, a woman goes haywire when Michael literally loses his head.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: House of Horrors
programme.desc: Michael reveals a coffee-making app, gets textually active with the world's thinnest disposable phone, and debuts a new beauty invention that turns ugly.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Kind of Like a Seafoam Green
programme.desc: Michael shows shoppers how to manipulate solid objects and reveals how vacuums work. Plus, one man's day becomes very colorful and confusing.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The 9-8
programme.desc: The Nine-Nine host the detectives from the Nine-Eight, their neighbouring precinct, reuniting Jake with his old partner. Charles is immediately jealous and tries to reclaim his best friend status with Jake.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Adrian Pimento
programme.desc: When an unstable detective returns to the Nine-Nine after years undercover, Jake doesn't know what to make of him. Meanwhile, Charles' rebellious behavior pits him against the precinct's custodian.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Cheddar
programme.desc: Holt allows Amy and Jake to house-sit for him while he visits Kevin in Paris, but mayhem ensues when Holt's beloved dog, Cheddar, goes missing under their watch. Meanwhile, a romantic fling between Adrian Pimento and Rosa disrupts Terry and the others.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Terry Kitties
programme.desc: In an attempt to prove to his old precinct that he's not a joke, Terry enlists Jake's help in solving a case from his past. Meanwhile, Adrian moves in with Charles, with mixed results.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: The Lizard Law
programme.desc: Never before seen footage; a severed camera cable; the magic team messing with Michael during a trick.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Out of Control
programme.desc: Find out how Michael makes himself sound like an expert, what he loves collecting and how the magic team surprised the rest of the crew.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Amvox 73
programme.desc: Find out what location was right next to an airport and a golf course, which animals kept getting loose on set and what other animal was camera shy.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Problem With Chocolate Turtles and Seeds
programme.desc: Find out what trick required the camera operator to hide inside a box for the entire day and how the show got its name.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: An Elevated Ferret Alert
programme.desc: Find out which trick made it hard for Michael to walk the next day, what trick was added at the last minute after a prop broke and what animal Michael fosters during shoots.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Skull With a Flower Hat
programme.desc: The trick that nearly burned Michaels face, who he gets in prank wars with on-set, and which trick did he created a prop for.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.desc: Harry is undaunted when he learns that great danger awaits him if he returns to Hogwarts. When he finally arrives at school, he finds a community in the grips of a mysterious and sinister terror that has literally 'petrified' some of its members.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
programme.desc: On his 11th birthday, Harry Potter receives a mysterious letter from the Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, telling him he has been chosen as one of the future students of the renowned school.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: Harry is undaunted when he learns that great danger awaits him if he returns to Hogwarts. When he finally arrives at school, he finds a community in the grips of a mysterious and sinister terror that has literally 'petrified' some of its members.

programme.title: Zoey’s Extraordinary Playlist: Pilot
programme.desc: Zoey, an introverted computer programmer living in San Francisco, begins to hear the innermost desires of the people around her through song.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashian Rewind
programme.desc: Take a nostalgic look back at the stories that made the Kardashians who they are today, with an exclusive look ahead to season 11.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Surprise Engagement Part 2
programme.desc: The family gathers in San Francisco to surprise Kim on her birthday but the real surprise is Kanye proposing to Kim. Meanwhile, Scott heads to New York to spend time with his father and sick mother.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Two Birthdays and a Yard Sale
programme.desc: Kourtney attempts to organize a family yard sale. Kendall prepares for her 18th birthday and makes plans to move out of the house, while Bruce tries to pretend his upcoming birthday is no big deal.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Courage to Change
programme.desc: Khloé must make a choice about her complicated relationship with Lamar. Meanwhile, Kourtney takes Scott on a getaway to a spa in Arizona and Rob receives troubling news about his health.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Let It Go
programme.desc: The family tries to get to the bottom of Kourtney's lack of emotions. Meanwhile, Khloé accepts an offer on her house but doesn’t want to start packing, and Kris goes out of her way to prove to Kim that she's still got it.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Color Me Lonely
programme.desc: Kris goes overboard trying to make sure Bruce isn’t getting lonely now that they are separated. Meanwhile, Scott and Kourtney inherit a painting that might be worth millions.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Doggy Blu's
programme.desc: Khloé wonders if she's being too hard on Kris. Meanwhile, Kendall and Kris battle over Kendall's dog, and Scott surprises Kourtney with his new mobile office.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Vienna Incidents
programme.desc: A trip to Vienna proves to be an eye opening experience for Kim and Kris as they encounter some shocking racist remarks. Meanwhile, Kourtney finds excuses to stall moving into her new home.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Playing Dirty
programme.desc: Kris encourages Kourtney to shut down Scott's lavish plans for their new backyard. Things get down and dirty for Kim & Khloé when they find themselves in a mud wrestling match.

programme.title: Meet the Frasers: Fraser Fabulous
programme.desc: Matt Fraser is a psychic medium, but he couldn't see the future clearly enough to know that hiring his family would lead to trouble. After a breakdown, he asks his stylist to make the Frasers look more professional.

programme.title: Meet the Frasers: Morning Cookie
programme.desc: Matt's parents, Rod and Angela, move in with Matt and have their 'morning cookie' day and night and psychic powers can't save him now! Alexa kicks off her beauty pageant prep and Matt helps her pick out his perfect pageant dress.

programme.title: Botched: Double D-isaster
programme.desc: Paul helps a female impersonator who isn't comfortable walking the streets without makeup. A woman with 'sideshow boobs' goes under the knife to help her marriage, and the doctors extract silicone star implants from a former body-modification enthusiast.

programme.title: Botched: Went to Mexico and Got Terrible Rhinorrhea
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif helps a mother of three out of a snotty situation, while Dr. Dubrow transforms a woman whose ex-boyfriend pressured her to get extremely large implants. Later, we meet a man from Kentucky who wants the King of Pop's infamous nose.

programme.title: Botched: Here Comes Tummy Boo Hoo
programme.desc: In the season finale, Dr. Nassif helps a fellow Lebanese patient get the nose she wants in time for her wedding, Dr. Dubrow attempts to fix a woman's strip mall boob job, and Mama June from 'Honey Boo Boo' fame needs a fupa lift.

programme.title: Botched: Pinched Perfect
programme.desc: Paul helps a singer find his voice again with a revision rhinoplasty, and Terry reconstructs the chest of a young mother whose surgeon put in two different sized implants. Later, the doctors assist a woman with stretched earlobes.

programme.title: Chopped: Clean Eatin'
programme.desc: The chefs are instructed to make delicious healthy dishes that are suitable for someone who's watching their weight and concerned about nutrition. In the first round, some legumes legitimately confound some of the chefs.

programme.title: Chopped: The Light Stuff
programme.desc: Four fit chefs take on the challenge to cook creative, healthy dishes that are light on calories but big on flavor.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Love

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In the Nick of Time
programme.desc: Texas Summer has Game Wardens Chelsea and Ben rushing to a call about a capsized canoe. Game Warden Deschaaf investigates a trapped deer that leads to more questions than answers. At Canyon Lake, Game Wardens assist in the arrest of a man with a warrant.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: High Desert Drama
programme.desc: The Game Wardens are busy on land and water. In Hunt County, residents are concerned about alleged wolves being kept as pets. Rehabilitated turtles are released on the high seas. In West Texas, wild donkeys are under threat.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bucks and Bows
programme.desc: A hunter is confronted for killing a deer with a gun in bowhunting only season. A man is questioned for being in possession of venomous copperhead snakes. While checking bowhunters at night, a game warden helps find an injured hunter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In the Crosshairs
programme.desc: Game wardens enforce the law across Texas. A hunting club has a trespassing issue. People are caught attempting to illegally cross the Rio Grande. An argument between neighbors is mediated. Fishermen receive citations on the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Puppy Bowl: Inside the Bowl: The Story of Rudy

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sparks Flying
programme.desc: During the holiday weekend a jet skier is reported missing, while another is caught without a life vest. Warden Kiel witnesses a fist fight during the fireworks, and warden Cummings handles underage drinkers.

programme.desc: In a special episode of Lone Star Law, two men are investigated for animal cruelty, while a case is opened for suspected animal poaching in Leon County. Meanwhile, warden Bailey stops a shrimper who is operating without a license.

programme.desc: A couple is suspected of killing a deer during off-season. Warden Iles transports orphaned baby armadillos for rehabilitation, and Warden Gould searches for a mountain lion that is lurking near a recreational park in Laredo.

programme.desc: A Pomeranian pup struggles to make friends until he meets some baby chicks his own size.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Saving Bear
programme.desc: To save a puppy's leg, Dr. Jeff tackles a surgical procedure he's never done before. A ferret bites off more than he can chew. Dr. Don makes a disturbing discovery when treating a rescued cat.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi and the Otters
programme.desc: Wes and Robert remove eggs from the nest of saltwater crocs Terra and Bosco, in a nerve-wracking but necessary venture. Bindi tends to the training of otters Percival and Daisy, and Terri makes a Zoo Volunteer's dream come true.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Tiger Mother-daughter Drama
programme.desc: Sumatran tiger, Kirana, and her daughter Kasarna, have started to clash at mealtimes. The keepers must come up with a plan to sort out the tensions between mother and child.

programme.title: The Zoo: Slow Loris Romance
programme.desc: The slow loris has a tiny window for breeding, so staff anxiously help a potential pair connect. The veterinary team develop ground-breaking techniques to treat the stoic pigeons and an okapi with a limp gets a helping hand.

programme.desc: Return adopters visit Villalobos to find a dog that will feel at home on their boat. Tania and Mariah head out to rescue a stray that is hiding beneath a shipping container. And parolee Jammall starts to slip up, risking his future at the rescue.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Surprise Renovation for First-Time Homeowner

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar was an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: The Last Days of Pompeii
programme.desc: New archaeological technology reveals the doomed city of Pompeii as it existed during its final hours, and using cutting-edge science, experts uncover the long-lost secrets and treasures buried by the ravages of apocalypse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome's Great Wall
programme.desc: Hadrian's Wall was built to guard the frontiers of the ancient Roman Empire. Now, discoveries reveal who the Romans were trying to keep out with this 72-mile-long megastructure, and what it tells us about the ancient people of Iron Age Britain.

programme.title: The Last Days of Pompeii
programme.desc: New archaeological technology reveals the doomed city of Pompeii as it existed during its final hours, and using cutting-edge science, experts uncover the long-lost secrets and treasures buried by the ravages of apocalypse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome's Great Wall
programme.desc: Hadrian's Wall was built to guard the frontiers of the ancient Roman Empire. Now, discoveries reveal who the Romans were trying to keep out with this 72-mile-long megastructure, and what it tells us about the ancient people of Iron Age Britain.

programme.title: The Last Days of Pompeii
programme.desc: New archaeological technology reveals the doomed city of Pompeii as it existed during its final hours, and using cutting-edge science, experts uncover the long-lost secrets and treasures buried by the ravages of apocalypse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Easter Island
programme.desc: The mysterious statues of Easter Island were built by one of the world's strangest and most isolated civilizations, and today, new evidence reveals why they were built and what caused Easter Island's sudden downfall.

programme.title: Unearthed: House of Holy Relics
programme.desc: A medieval engineering marvel might be the home to the remains of the Bible's Three Magi, and we follow the scientists and experts who are delving deep into the mysteries of this incredible religious site.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Wrath of Thor
programme.desc: When a ghostly figure is caught on tape stalking people in Japan, some fear its hard evidence of a horrifying local legend.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Marine scientists discover a gruesome underwater death zone that seems to kill anything that dares to enter. When apocalyptic skies appear during a deadly earthquake in Ecuador, residents fear it's the end of days.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: America's Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: A strange creature like the Loch Ness Monster is recorded in America. Experts analyze evidence of a giant scaly egg, and some wonder if it belongs to a dragon. Birds are suddenly vaporized by an invisible death ray.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Beast That Ate Jaws
programme.desc: When a shark is eaten by a mysterious predator, experts wonder if a prehistoric monster is to blame. A sinister sight is caught on tape near Russia's Area 51, and the evidence might point to a cover-up.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Devil on One Shoulder
programme.desc: The task force finds the streets of Newark busier than ever during a rainstorm. An unexpected surprise forces the unit into pursuit. A crazy driver puts the unit's wet-weather skills to the test.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Saturday Night
programme.desc: A deliveryman has his car stolen at gunpoint, and the unit uses a decoy vehicle to try to catch the suspects. The Unit changes their schedule to catch the thieves off guard.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Chasing a Ghost
programme.desc: Investigators search for a murder suspect in the towns and mountainsides of Puerto Rico, which proves to be a nightmare.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Gun Store Heist
programme.desc: In Virginia Beach, Virginia, almost 30 handguns were stolen after thieves broke through the roof of a gun store. Detectives try to secure the firearms before the thieves have time to sell the guns on the streets.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Houdini
programme.desc: Newark police catch a suspect red-handed, but back at the precinct, the suspect escapes from the interrogation room. After 'Houdini' eludes several attempts to capture him over the next two months, the Fugitive Task Force takes over.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Moving Target
programme.desc: Deputy Mendez and the Fugitive Task Force search for a career criminal before another victim is robbed, assaulted, or worse.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Just One Step Behind
programme.desc: Detectives scour the streets to find people who are willing to provide information on a fugitive's whereabouts.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Detectives track a fugitive wanted for the second-degree rape of a young woman barely out of high school.

programme.title: American Justice: What Happened to Carrie Culberson?

programme.title: Nightwatch: Dreams and Nightmares
programme.desc: The first responders deal with a rash of scary calls, including a man suffering from amnesia after getting hit by a car and a woman who fell off a roof.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Fulton County Jail: Welcome to the A-T-L
programme.desc: In Atlanta's Fulton County Jail, Colonel Mark Adger is sending 17 undercover volunteers into his facility to find solutions to contraband, drug smuggling, and gang violence.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Truth or Dare
programme.desc: The first five participants enter the Fulton County Jail and are immediately met with drug use, sexual behavior, and what it feels like to be locked in a cell for 12 hours.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Trust Issues
programme.desc: As participants settle into Fulton County Jail and new ones enter, inmate suspicions and power-plays keep everyone on edge.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Cellies
programme.desc: A violent fight in the women's pod and an abuse of power in pod 600 cause extended lockdowns, proving that the luck of the draw with cell mates can make or break the experience in jail.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Dangerous Liaisons
programme.desc: The participants make uneasy alliances that could put them at risk, and face difficult obstacles in order to survive life on the inside.

programme.title: American Monster: Double Cross
programme.desc: Four best friends, two married couples, multiple sordid secrets, one huge betrayal and a murder. With exclusive interviews and never-before-aired home movie footage, this is a story about how a love affair resulted in a crime of passion.

programme.title: American Monster: Looks Can Kill
programme.desc: When mysterious and beautiful Rebecca Thudin meets the dashing Larry Fenton, a whirlwind romance is sparked. The rich, successful pair seem to be a match made in heaven, until a murder exposes a tangled web of lies, deceit and buried secrets.

programme.title: American Monster: Momma's Girl
programme.desc: Great-Grandfather Arthur Burney knows he's lucky to have such a large loving family. But when a dead body is discovered everyone becomes a suspect - and it'll take an unexpected tip-off to reveal the mastermind behind the murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Too Good to be True
programme.desc: When attractive teacher Amanda Schmitt marries respected John Grazioli, home video captures their beautiful wedding. But just 6 months later, police respond to a 911 call and make a shocking discovery that unmasks the double life of a cold-hearted killer.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Can't Let Go
programme.desc: When 18-year-old Misty falls in love with a man nearly 15 years her senior, Misty's parents warn against the relationship. But no one could predict the danger Misty is in, or how this man will change all their lives forever.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Nights I Don't Remember
programme.desc: On the mornings when Joylynn Martinez couldn't remember the night before, she always told herself that she must have had too much to drink. She never suspected that her own husband, Robert Howard Bruce, was responsible or that he was just getting started.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: The Hero Who Wasn't
programme.desc: When a couple enters their home during a robbery in progress, a deadly shoot out erupts, leaving two people dead. But when police begin an investigation they discover clues that it may not have been what it appears to be.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Evil Undercover
programme.desc: When Lori McLeod fell for a man claiming to be an FBI agent, she felt certain that she would always be safe. Now, as the end of her life draws near, Lori is determined to ensure that the murderer who betrayed her family never becomes a free man.

programme.desc: When 18-year-old Misty falls in love with a man nearly 15 years her senior, Misty's parents warn against the relationship. But no one could predict the danger Misty is in, or how this man will change all their lives forever.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Serenade of a Stalker
programme.desc: 33 year old Nikki is building a karaoke business with her husband, Ben. But one night, a customer with an obsession for Nikki ends not only the dream but shatters her entire life with an act of extreme and unprovoked violence.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Beauty in the Bronx
programme.desc: Evimer, a beautiful young woman afraid of love, meets a handsome stranger who she soon falls deeply for. But his charm turns to violent jealousy and Ramon becomes convinced that if he cannot have Evie, nobody can.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Frozen in Fear
programme.desc: A pedestrian check turns deadly when a cop is gunned down on a midnight patrol. The attacker flees with the officer's squad car...and her weapon. The stakes are higher than ever as investigators try to capture the person who killed one of their own.

programme.title: Alaska: Ice Cold Killers: Mountain Man
programme.desc: When a couple goes missing, troopers discover they're the victims of a cold-blooded murderer and begin a search for the killer.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Frozen Carnage
programme.desc: The innocent existence of a small Alaskan town is shattered when a newcomer goes on rampage and guns down residents one by one, ultimately taking out one tenth of the town.

programme.title: Alaska: Ice Cold Killers: North Pole Slay Ride
programme.desc: In the town of North Pole, the bodies of young women begin turning up one by one.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Holy Terror
programme.desc: Gunshots rip through the icy Idaho air, leaving a young woman gunned down in her doorway. Left behind: shell casings and a trail of footprints in the snow. Police must piece together the clues to catch the shooter in this coldest of crimes.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Guns, Gold & Murder
programme.desc: Police are met with a myriad of mysterious theories after a well-known Alaskan gold miner and political activist vanishes without a trace. Was it an alien abduction, a government conspiracy or cold blooded murder?

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: On a snowy Pittsburgh night a young doctor is found beaten, slashed and slain in his bathtub. While everyone struggles with the shocking loss, detectives develop a psychological profile of a killer who will likely strike again unless they find him.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Bitter Blade
programme.desc: When a beautiful home healthcare worker disappears during an icy New York night, loved ones lead the search for her safe return. But a series of incoming text messages and a mysterious missed call reveal a soul-crushing truth and a murder most evil.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: The Darkest of Nights
programme.desc: On a cold Virginia night a pretty and popular teenage girl vanishes. Her abandoned car is found in the parking lot where she works... but there's no sign of her.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Blizzard of Bullets
programme.desc: During chilling winter nights in Idaho, a madman is on the prowl... attacking citizens in a crime spree that stuns families and terrifies whole communities. Investigators must race against time to catch a killer... who kills for the thrill of it.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea
programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Pablo Escobar: King of Cocaine
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. He met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Restored: 1947 Postmodern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1947 postmodern ranch back to its post-World War II style for a military veteran and his wife. However, he has to make some tough decisions when the homeowners want to get rid of the original kitchen tile.

programme.title: Restored: Restoring a Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Restoration expert Brett Waterman is hired to restore a 1913 Arts and Crafts bungalow. This 100 year-old home has experienced incomplete renovations and numerous bad choices over the years. Brett rediscovers the home's history and architectural features.

programme.title: Restored: 1900 Victorian Farmhouse
programme.desc: A couple seeks Brett's help restoring their big 1900 Victorian Farmhouse in time for their wedding. They're hoping he can design a rustic kitchen, update the laundry area and add light to the interior rooms closed off by past modifications.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Crunch Time
programme.desc: Impending weather is making crunch time at the builds that much more desperate. Rich is forced to make a crucial building decision. Tom risks stranding his workers. Creig battles freezing temperatures.

programme.title: Building Alaska: My Life Is in Your Hands
programme.desc: Three new couples challenge the Alaskan elements. Mike and Kathleen Kondus build atop a windy tundra, first-time builders Mike and Teresa Oldenkamp construct a complex cabin and Paige Drobny and Cody Strathe create a dog-training facility on haunted land.

programme.title: Building Alaska: From Temporary to Permanent
programme.desc: Mike and Kathleen begin on the foundation, but their nail gun goes on the fritz and the posts aren't level. Dog mushers Paige and Cody run low on supplies. Mike and Teresa work on their foundation with a damaged excavator.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Family Is a Good Thing
programme.desc: The Hills race to finish installing their floor to avoid a delivery delay, which leads to an on-site injury. Meanwhile, Jackie and her team run into problems when their build materials start to fall apart.

programme.title: Building Alaska: This Is the Sketchy Part
programme.desc: The Hills work on their first floor framing, but work slows to a stop when their tools begin to freeze. The Owens work on installing the second story gables, while Jackie and her team work to finish the cabin's roof structure.
