programme.title: Heritage Hunters: Wine Stave Porch Railing
programme.desc: Bug and his team attempt a large, stubborn tear down that could be their biggest score ever, if the materials are even salvageable. Then, the gang takes on a front porch renovation that forces them to get creative with 18th-century Victorian materials.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Snow Sisters Each Design One Half of a House
programme.desc: The Snows take on a large house that must be cut in half before it can be moved, but only one half shows up at the new site.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: No Living Room Blues
programme.desc: Randy wins a large home with very big bedrooms, but there's no defined living room and it has a fairly small kitchen and dining room. He must create a floor plan that will open up the space for a communal living area while maintaining bedroom space.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Casey's Home Based Business Flip
programme.desc: Casey scores a house with good hardwood floors near downtown Fort Worth, but later discovers asbestos siding that has to be removed. Casey and contractor Catrina turn this tumble down house into an ideal place for a home-based business.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Suzi's Custom Bling Closet Remodel
programme.desc: Cody and Suzi Slay win a house that has great potential, despite a weird layout that has no usable closets. Suzi decides to have Cody build a luxury walk-in closet modeled after her closet at home. Meanwhile, the Snows make money moving school buildings.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow's Rustic Western Themed Ranch House Renovation
programme.desc: The Snow Sisters win a termite damaged three bedroom house that is almost entirely covered with dated faux wood paneling.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Hook, Line and Sinker
programme.desc: A couple buys a dilapidated cabin in Phillips, Maine, in hopes of keeping the area's fly-fishing traditions alive. Chase Morrill and his team pull out all the stops to fix a myriad of issues in just 11 weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Inspirations Brewing
programme.desc: When Chase and his brother-in-law learn that the owner of their latest cabin project works at Allagash Brewing Company, they're excited to check out the brewery for inspiration as they turn the weekend getaway into a three-season home away from home.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 130-Year-Old Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle the renovation of a 130-year-old cabin located on an island with a budget of $40,000 and a time frame of six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the Bride
programme.desc: Chase and his team are back home in Augusta getting ready for Lance's wedding. Chase gets a call about a little log cabin stuck in a backyard. He sees the cabin as a fun project for the team to work on and present to Lance's lovely bride.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: I Love Lucy 60th Anniversary
programme.desc: Bakers vie for a place at the celebration of the 60th anniversary of 'I Love Lucy'.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet Of The Dates
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is ready for 1,001 nights of fun at the Arabian Nights-themed Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival in Indio, Calif. He makes a date with a dangerous burger and enjoys a sweet mashup with the churro dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There Will Be Bacon
programme.desc: Noah Cappe pigs out at the Bacon and Bourbon Fest in Wellington, Fla., where all-American classics make an appearance in the stuffed crust bacon-za, but it's the peanut butter pork donuts that hit the sweet and salty spot.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mocktail
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes loco for Sunshine State snacks at the Manatee County Fair in Palmetto, Fla. There's lots of ooey-gooey goodness in the pizza supremo burger and the ulti-melt burger, but it's the sandia loca that has Noah flipping out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Beauty and the Beef
programme.desc: It's love at first bite as Noah Cappe munches on some Texas-sized treats at Rodeo Austin. With a tagline of "where Western meets weird," the Rodeo is the place to find one-of-a-kind carnival eats like the Kobe beef Rodeo Austin burger.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fight Club Sandwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe meets his match with some knock-out fruity feasts at the Florida Strawberry Festival in Plant City. He starts the day with the strawberry French toast burger and slurps the way better strawberry shake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Dog Time Machine
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes a trip to the Coastal Carolina Fair near Charleston, S.C., where he samples a local legend, Jack's Cosmic Dog. Trolling the fairgrounds, Noah catches the catfish sundae and takes a bite of fall flavors with the pumpkin cheesecake pop.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amman
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the rich and welcoming dishes of Amman, Jordan. The city's multicultural influences have created a culinary scene steeped in hospitality. Andrew samples some of the more well-known dishes such as towers of goat and veggies and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Sicily
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern samples Sicily's fried street eats, classic cannoli and unique pizza.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Asheville
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the iconic eats of Asheville, North Carolina. The eclectic food city features tangy barbecue, decadent sweet potato pie, mouth-watering fried chicken, succulent rainbow trout and giant soft-dough biscuits with savory gravy.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tel Aviv
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern reveals Tel Aviv's most iconic eats, from falafel to hummus to shawarma.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Sights and Bites
programme.desc: Diners make mouth-watering memories at these top bites by monumental sites across the country, from sandwiches stacked with international flavors across the street from the National Zoo to silky, sweet ice cream sundaes near Golden Gate Park.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Hook, Line and Dinner
programme.desc: From a Jersey Shore eatery where lobster boats tie up next to the tables, to legendary seafood stew in San Diego and deep-fried stuffed crab in Baltimore, get hooked up with the most succulent, savory and spectacular seafood in the country!

programme.title: Simply Laura: Lessons From Nonna
programme.desc: Laura's passion for food and cooking was inspired by her Italian grandmother, who taught her not only how to cook, but how to spread love through food. Today Laura takes you on a very personal journey through her some of her Nonna's favorite dishes.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Laura's Leftovers
programme.desc: There is nothing more fun and creative than making a new meal from yesterday's leftovers. Laura demonstrates her tricks for turning everyday leftovers into a delicious meal.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Family Style
programme.desc: Entertaining friends and family should be fun, but it isn't always the case. Laura shows us her secret to an impressive and stress free family meal.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Date Night
programme.desc: Laura creates a date-night dinner at home from fresh ingredients, without a hefty price tag. Seared New York Strip steak takes center plate, but no steak dinner is complete without the sides, and no date night complete without flowers.

programme.title: Simply Laura: All Day Breakfast
programme.desc: Laura's inspired to create an all-day breakfast menu. She prepares creme fraiche and veggie frittata, smoked salmon and dill quiche and a breakfast bruschetta bar.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Girls' Day and Night!
programme.desc: Laura spends a full day with her girls before heading out for some shopping and pampering she tackles some finger foods that she can assemble before the fun.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Open House Brunch
programme.desc: An open house style brunch includes orange spiced crumb cake and creamy scrambled eggs.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Mexican Brunch
programme.desc: One of bobby's favourite destinations gives him the inspiration for this colorful Mexican meal. Recipes include Mexican corn pancakes and crispy breakfast potatoes with red chile lime hollandaise.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Farmer's Market Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby takes his favorite green market finds to make a healthy weekend brunch. His menu features tomato strata, zucchini pancakes with apricot butter, and seared salmon with a crunchy Brussels sprouts-apple salad.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: French-American Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay adds a hint of American influence to French Bistro style dishes.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Cheat Day
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson gears up for his favourite day of the week- cheat day! It's a full-on sugar and carb overload with everything from cakes to shakes.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Spice Up Your Life
programme.desc: Forget about standard spicy seasonings. Eddie Jackson rounds up dishes made with the hottest, zippiest and peppiest peppers out there.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Between the Bun
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson reveals entirely excessive and utterly outrageous takes on the humble hamburger. Beef patties and two buns are required, but every other ingredient is maxed out to create the most exorbitant burgers ever imagined.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Smothered to the Max
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes in for a full day of over-the-top, smothered goodness. Indulgent in every bite, these dishes range from drool-worthy, savory and sumptuous meals to mouthwatering, sticky, sweet and syrupy desserts.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: A Day of Comfort Food
programme.desc: Comfort food enthusiast Eddie Jackson runs down a day full of the best comfort food in the world, starting with an indulgent brioche French toast breakfast and an over-the-top sweet and savory brunch. He then grabs hot dogs and hamburgers for lunch.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Frankenfoods
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes through a full day of mind-blowing food combinations, from new takes on old favorites to presentations that aren't quite what they appear to be. These pairings keep diners guessing and leave their taste buds begging for more.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Serious Sandwiches
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shows off the most scrumptious and seriously stunning sandwiches ever created. These shockers prove that there are truly no limits to what can be placed between two slices of bread.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Deep-Fried Frenzy
programme.desc: Nothing's better than a little batter and hot oil. Eddie Jackson tracks down the crunchiest, most-delectable deep-fried foods that will put any food lover in a total frenzy.

programme.desc: The 1980s begin with Herschel Walker leading Georgia to a national title as a freshman. After Bear Bryant retires in 1982 and passes away four weeks later, control of the SEC is eventually transferred to Pat Dye and Bo Jackson at Auburn.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Six: 1990-1999
programme.desc: The 1990s bring change with expansion and the sport's first-ever conference championship game. Florida's Steve Spurrier fashions an era of high-octane offense, and his Gators form a rivalry with Tennessee and quarterback Peyton Manning.

programme.title: Conan
programme.desc: Today's guest is Josh Gad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Married Man Sleepover
programme.desc: Caroline asks Max and Deke to join her on her dinner date at Nicolas' loft to help make sure she doesn't do anything she might regret. Also, Max and Caroline treat themselves to very special hair appointments.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Near Death Experience
programme.desc: Caroline goes into a tailspin and brings Max into the mix when Nicolas tells her he's going to leave his wife for her.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Kilt Trap
programme.desc: Caroline tries to fit in with Max and the diner gang as they go out to get wild and crazy at the St. Patrick's Day parade but finds herself longing to practice her former holiday traditions at the Plaza Hotel.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Apartment
programme.desc: Raymond is green with envy over Robert's new apartment building and his sexy neighbours.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Toaster
programme.desc: Ray is devastated when he learns his parents traded in the Christmas gift he gave them.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Ping Pong
programme.desc: Ray challenges Frank to a winner-take-all ping-pong re-match to settle the score.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Pants on Fire
programme.desc: Marie is heartbroken when she uncovers evidence that Ray was not a perfect teenager.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Robert's Date
programme.desc: Robert's entire demeanor changes when he starts clubbing with his patrol partner, Judy.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Pool Guy
programme.desc: George is worried when Elaine decides to befriend Susan. Kramer's new phone number is similar to a film information line. After Jerry encounters his health club's pool guy outside a movie theatre, he can't get rid of him.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Sponge
programme.desc: Elaine discovers that the company for her birth control items has gone out of business.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Gum
programme.desc: Kramer persuades everyone to try a stick of his nervous friend's Chinese gum. Elaine accidentally reveals herself to Kramer and his rattled friend, Lloyd.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Rye
programme.desc: Problems arise when George and Susan's parents have dinner together for the first time.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Frank Jr.
programme.desc: When Phoebe invites her brother down for the weekend, he believes she works in a brothel.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Flashback
programme.desc: Janice asks if any of the gang have slept together, which brings back a flood of memories.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Race Car Bed
programme.desc: Monica buys a bed from Janice's ex, but mistakenly receives a child's race car bed.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Giant Poking Device
programme.desc: A poking device concocted by the gang will determine if 'ugly naked guy' is still alive.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Football
programme.desc: Thanksgiving Day touches off a feast of emotions among friends who play touch football.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rachel Quits
programme.desc: Chandler and Joey convince Rachel to quit her job because she hates making coffee.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Chandler Can't Remember Which Sister
programme.desc: At Joey's birthday party, Chandler gets drunk and sleeps with one of Joey's sisters.

programme.title: Friends: The One With All the Jealousy
programme.desc: Ross is jealous of Rachel's new co-worker, Mark; Joey lies about his dancing abilities.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Monica and Richard Are Just Friends
programme.desc: Richard and Monica bump into each other and try to be friends; Phoebe dates an athlete.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Phoebe's Ex-Partner
programme.desc: Phoebe is reunited with her former singing partner; Ross is jealous of Rachel's friend.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross and Rachel Take a Break
programme.desc: When Ross and Rachel get into a heated argument, Rachel suggests they take a break.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Morning After
programme.desc: After cooling off, Rachel realizes she wants Ross, who is hiding his affair.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Carla Cretoxyrhina/ Train Trouble
programme.desc: On this underwater excursion, the Pteranodon family meets up with Carla Cretoxyrhina, a young shark who turns out to be much nicer than her reputation suggests.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That: Chasing Rainbows/ Follow the Prints
programme.desc: The kids are trying to paint a picture of a rainbow but can't remember all of the colours to use. Luckily for them, the Cat takes them to Colour-ga-lore to meet King Kaleidoscope, an expert on rainbows.

programme.title: Wild Kratts: Kickin' It With the Roos
programme.desc: A joey steals Chris and Martin's car keys when they meet up with a mob of red kangaroos.

programme.title: Odd Squad: Training Day
programme.desc: Olive tells the story of what happened to her old partner. Algebraic thinking is showcased.

programme.title: BBC World News: America
programme.desc: BBC correspondent Katty Kay anchors BBC AMERICA's award-winning hour-long, U.S.-targeted nightly newscast.

programme.title: PBS NewsHour
programme.desc: An analysis of current events with a news summary, discussions, and news features.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow: Winterthur Museum, Garden and Library (Hour Three)
programme.desc: Wrap up Antiques Roadshow's first-ever visit to Delaware with incredible appraisals including 1820 J.J. Audubon portraits, a Ming Dynasty Xiwangmu figure and Ric Binkley science fiction illustrations, ca. 1950.

programme.title: No Passport Required: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Explore the large and thriving Armenian community in Los Angeles with Chef Marcus Samuelsson as he learns about their history, shares their traditional cuisine, and meets chefs who are taking it to the next level.

programme.title: Shattered Dreams: Sex Trafficking in America
programme.desc: Personal stories from those affected by sex-trafficking in America are shared.

programme.title: Independent Lens: Accept the Call
programme.desc: Yusuf Abdurahman, who left Somalia as a refugee 25 years ago, has his worst fear realized when his son is arrested in an FBI counterterrorism sting. Follow Yusuf as he strives to understand why his child would leave America and attempt to join ISIS.

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: In-depth conversations with global thought leaders and cultural influencers.

programme.title: No Passport Required: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Explore the large and thriving Armenian community in Los Angeles with Chef Marcus Samuelsson as he learns about their history, shares their traditional cuisine, and meets chefs who are taking it to the next level.

programme.title: Vienna Blood: The Last Seance
programme.desc: Junior doctor Max Liebermann asks to observe a criminal case for his studies. Inspector Oskar Rheinhardt reluctantly offers him full access to the case of a murdered woman.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Sanditon
programme.desc: Young Stringer presses Tom for back pay owed his builders, currently toiling under dangerous conditions. Aided by the new doctor, Charlotte and Sidney respond to an emergency. Miss Lambe pines for her absent lover.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Howards End
programme.desc: Mrs. Wilcox's family is surprised by her final request. The Schlegels face eviction. The Schlegel sisters take up the cause of Jacky Bast's husband.

programme.title: Emery Blagdon and His Healing Machine
programme.desc: With pliers in hand, artist Emery Blagdon fashions pieces of wire into patterns attached with foil, beads and ribbons.

programme.title: Classical Stretch: By Essentrics: Feet and Calf Workout
programme.desc: This gentle standing and bar workout is designed to relieve foot pain and shin splints.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Meets Mister Rogers/ Draw!
programme.desc: Mister Rogers is staying at Arthur's house but Arthur's friends don't know about it, yet. Mister Rogers is a nice guy, but his show is for babies. Can Arthur keep his friends in the dark? Also, Fern draws a not-too-flattering cartoon of Francine.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go!: Mindy Turns Five
programme.desc: Mindy has finally turned five and the kids convince her to have her tea party on the moon.

programme.title: Nature Cat: Ocean Commotion
programme.desc: A day of celebration has gone from joyous fun to total sadness as Nature Cat accidentally drops Mr. Chewinsky, Hal's favourite chew toy, down the storm drain.

programme.title: Splash and Bubbles: The Kelp Needs Help/ Mountain of Fire
programme.desc: Splash, Ripple, and Tidy must stop the starfish from eating all of the kelp. Later, Splash tells his friends about a mountain that spits out fire.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Ice Sculpture/ Tale of the Totem
programme.desc: Molly decides to organize an ice-sculpting competition in Qyah.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum: I Am Mary Leaky/ I Am Alexander Hamilton
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Xavier, Yadina, & Brad as they travel back to meet famous heroes.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: She Is the Moon of Moons/ Beats of Beijing
programme.desc: In Beijing, when the kids decide to give Luna her own special day, they discover that China already celebrates her with the Moon Festival.

programme.title: Peg + Cat: The Tree by the Nile Problem/ The Eid al-Adha Adventure
programme.desc: Cat gets stuck in a tree in Egypt. Cat is asked to give more than he expected.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: You Are Special/ Daniel Is Special
programme.desc: The children are putting on a show at school, each doing something that makes them special.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Hey! Sesame Street News
programme.desc: Cookie Monster becomes a journalist for Abby and Big Bird's newspaper, 'Hey Sesame Street News!'.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Fashion Fun/ Welcome Pinka Bear
programme.desc: Jasmine, Lila and Pinkalicious are inspired by fashion designs to create their own, unique outfits. But when Pinkalicious' design comes apart at the seams, she learns that with a little innovation, she can create an even more pinkaperfect dress.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Sweet Dough
programme.desc: The seven remaining bakers prepare regional buns. Jam doughnuts and an enriched dough loaf are made.

programme.title: Great Performances: Shakespeare Live! From the Royal Shakespeare Company
programme.desc: On the 400th anniversary of Shakespeare’s death, RSC's star-studded gala. With David Tennant, Benedict Cumberbatch, Judi Dench, Joseph Fiennes, John Lithgow, Ian McKellen, Helen Mirren, David Suchet and many more.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: The Durrells in Corfu
programme.desc: With the house guests getting rowdier, Louisa worries about the villa's reputation, but Spiros' increased presence continues to delight her. Margo finds a surprising way to bond with Maud. Gerry realizes he has feelings for Galini.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Devil's Dissections/ Criminal Pathology
programme.desc: The team is called back to a beach where serial killer Gregory Yates buried his many victims after another victim washes up. Rollins tries to coax Yates into confession, but he reveals a surprising bit of information.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Devil's Dissections/ Criminal Pathology
programme.desc: The team is called back to a beach where serial killer Gregory Yates buried his many victims after another victim washes up. Rollins tries to coax Yates into confession, but he reveals a surprising bit of information.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Nationwide Manhunt
programme.desc: Chicago P.D. detectives Lindsay and Dawson join the SVU in the hunt for two escaped murderers they helped to convict.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Song of Gregory William Yates
programme.desc: Gregory Yates escapes from prison and the team learns he intends to flee to New York. The SVU team informs Intelligence that he has been gathering information on Lindsay.

programme.title: WWE Raw
programme.desc: Great athletes and electrifying performers from the world of sports entertainment.

programme.title: Modern Family: Pilot
programme.desc: A satirical look at three different families and the trials they deal with in life.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Bicycle Thief
programme.desc: Phil is determined to help Luke prove to his mom that he is responsible enough to have the brand new bike they just got him. However, Phil ends up being the irresponsible one when a hot neighbour clouds his judgment.

programme.title: Modern Family: Come Fly With Me
programme.desc: After some nudging, Jay begrudgingly takes Phil out to fly his new model airplane, but a manoeuvre goes awry. Meanwhile, when Gloria drops Manny off to play with Luke, she ends up volunteering to take Alex dress shopping.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Incident
programme.desc: Claire and Mitchell's mother drops in for a surprise visit, determined to make amends with everyone she offended during what has been deemed 'The Incident' at Jay and Gloria's wedding. No one is happy to see her, and it all comes to a head at dinner.

programme.title: Modern Family: Coal Digger
programme.desc: The whole family is invited to Jay and Gloria's for a barbecue and football. However, an earlier incident at school between Manny and Luke makes things very awkward for Gloria and Claire, and things escalate when a not-so-flattering label is uttered.

programme.title: Modern Family: Run for Your Wife
programme.desc: As the kids head back to school, Phil oversteps when he misreads how Claire is coping with an empty nest. Over at Jay's, he and Gloria are in disagreement over Manny's interesting choice of outfit for his first day of class.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: In the Line of Duty
programme.desc: After U.S. Ambassador Nancy Kelly escapes a terrorist attack at the U.S. consulate in Tunisia, Callen and Sam are sent on a secret and dangerous mission to obtain key evidence from the crime scene. Upon their return, Kelly helps provide information.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Black Wind
programme.desc: Callen and Sam go undercover as food truck owners in Mexico to find the source of an anthrax poisoning before it's used to create a bioweapon.

programme.title: Dateline: Twisted Tale
programme.desc: When Denise Huskins reappeared just two days after her boyfriend reported she was abducted, police accused the couple of perpetrating a hoax. But another, similar crime caused authorities to re-examine the case.

programme.title: Dateline: The Girl With the Red Shoes
programme.desc: A teenage girl is murdered at a scenic spot on a Utah river. The case almost goes cold until a hairdresser turned detective, with the help of the victim's determined mom, finds the truth. Dennis Murphy reports.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Lucky Strike
programme.desc: The team is called to investigate a deadly police chase and the kidnapping of a young boy.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Forest for the Trees
programme.desc: Callen and Sam are kidnapped when they follow an anonymous tip about a missing NSA agent. When the team discovers they are missing they realize it could have been a trap set by terrorists.

programme.title: NCIS: Grace Period
programme.desc: The NCIS team discovers a tip about terrorist activity was a trap that resulted in the death of two agents. Blaming herself Agent Cassidy works with the team to track down the people responsible.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Rotten
programme.desc: Guards are suspects in the sexual assault and beating death of a drug dealer in prison.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Mercy
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a one-month-old baby found stuffed in a cooler.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Pandora
programme.desc: An informant for the FBI, tracking on-line pedophiles, is brutally raped and murdered.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Tortured
programme.desc: When the body of a torture survivor is found, detectives investigate the victim's past.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Privilege
programme.desc: After the apparent suicide of a girl, the detectives search through her past for skeletons in the closet.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Desperate
programme.desc: When a woman is found murdered, the detectives rest their hopes of solving the crime on the victim's young son.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Appearances
programme.desc: The detectives search for a pedophile with a fetish for young beauty pageant queens.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mother Simpson

programme.title: The Office: The Convention

programme.desc: Michael is being considered for a job at corporate and has to recommend his replacement.

programme.desc: Doug and Carrie have different opinions about Deacon and Kelly's recent separation.

programme.desc: Doug helps his cousin Danny get a job at IPS; Arthur joins a film focus group.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Pregnant Pause
programme.desc: An evening of romance between Carrie and Doug results in a totally unexpected surprise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: When new DNA technology becomes available, cold case investigators in Tennessee think they'll finally be able to find out who killed a local college student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Monster Under the Bed
programme.desc: When three hotel workers don't turn up for their shift, a bizarre series of discoveries reveals a twisted workplace love triangle.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Aaron Hernandez: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Poisonous Affair
programme.desc: When cancer researcher Dr. George Blumenschein ends up admitted at his own hospital a toxic work environment may be to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Cash Days Comes to OKC
programme.desc: Thirty-two of the fastest racers from around the country gather in OKC for the biggest street race of the year Cash Days. And, with $50,000 on the line, all the racers are prepared to push their cars to the limit to try and win it all.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: A $50,000 Weekend
programme.desc: After round one of Cash Days in OKC, sixteen drivers are left to compete for the grand prize of $50,000, and the 405 is proud that half of them are OKC racers. But, the street proves to be slick, it's not clear that the risks outweighs the reward.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Bristol: Race to $100K
programme.desc: The 405 are in Bristol, Tennessee to compete in the biggest no prep event in Street Outlaws history. With 32 of the baddest cars around competing for $100,000, the OKC racers give it everything they've got in order to take the win.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Bristol: Race to $100K Part 2
programme.desc: In the final throwdown, the 405 prove who's the baddest in Bristol.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: 8-City Showdown
programme.desc: JJ Da Boss has invited eight of the fastest street racing teams in the country to hit the Memphis asphalt for a chance to win $100,000. Chips are drawn and the bracket is established. setting the scene for the craziest first-round match-ups ever.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Memphis Against the World
programme.desc: Welcome to Memphis, where JJ and his family of racers do things a little differently. When JJ invites some of the biggest names in street racing to come to Memphis and race for money, the Memphis racers have to step up for their city.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: 8-City Showdown
programme.desc: JJ Da Boss has invited eight of the fastest street racing teams in the country to hit the Memphis asphalt for a chance to win $100,000. Chips are drawn and the bracket is established. setting the scene for the craziest first-round match-ups ever.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Doughboy Fresh
programme.desc: When JJ's son, Doughboy, wants to start racing on the street, JJ gets the family and racers together to decide if he's ready. But, with racers from both Mississippi and Missouri coming into town, the Memphis racers have their work cut out for them.

programme.title: Get Out Alive: Alabama Prison Riot
programme.desc: Byron Sanders is one of eleven prison officers taken hostage by inmates at FCI Talledega in Alabama. After a ten day ordeal, it's up to Commander Dick Rogers and the FBI's newly formed Hostage Rescue Team to get them out alive.

programme.title: Get Out Alive: Jungle Abduction
programme.desc: A company fishing trip turns into a nightmare when Texas oil worker Jerel Shaffer is abducted at gunpoint.

programme.title: Get Out Alive: Quecreek Mine Disaster
programme.desc: July 24 2002, Quecreek Mine, Pennsylvania: 9 miners are trapped in a mine filling with 90 million gallons of water. A huge drill starts to work on a rescue hole, but even that doesn't go according to plan and the miners doubt they'll make it out alive.

programme.title: Get Out Alive: Somali Pirate Attack
programme.desc: In 2008, British security guards Carl Mason and Mike Kelly were assigned to protect the oil tanker Biscaglia as it travelled through the Gulf of Aden; it was supposed to be an easy job until the ship was attacked by gun-toting, drug-crazed Somali pirates.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Stonehenge of the Holy Land
programme.desc: Legends of ancient giants surround a mysterious monument in the Holy Land. A bright pink lake could point to a strange, undiscovered new species. When a young boy disappears in a sand dune, satellite images help with the investigation.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Strange Symbols in the Desert
programme.desc: An amateur archaeologist stumbles upon strange symbols scratched into the Kazakhstan Desert. CIA surveillance photographs show what looks like a giant Star of David on the island of Cuba. A lake in the Brazilian rain forest has turned bright pink.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery in the Outback
programme.desc: A giant carving of a strange creature suddenly appears in the Australian Outback. Mysterious bright green lights illuminate the seas around Thailand. Top secret activity is discovered at Iran's nuclear facility.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Forbidden Cities of the Maya
programme.desc: A young boy makes international headlines when he uses satellite images to discover lost cities of the Maya. Satellite images might point to a modern-day genocide. Trees in China seem to be spelling out a sinister message.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Doomsday Forest
programme.desc: When mysterious structures are discovered deep in a remote forest, experts investigate if this strange site was the long-lost birthplace of a top-secret Nazi project that produced some of the deadliest weapons the world had ever seen.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: Bizarre markings are seen from space in oceans and deserts across the planet.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Stranglehold

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Friends in All Places
programme.desc: Bobby Flay's pals are coming in hot from the west and east coast to take him down at his own game! Michael Symon is here to settle the score, as he pits New York chef Alex Guarnaschelli against LA chef Jet Tila in this all-out battle of friends.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Next Food Network Star Is...
programme.desc: Food Network Star is in the house as Alton Brown enlists past season winners Damaris Phillips and Justin Warner to give Mr. Flay the run-around in his own kitchen. The tables might be turned, but the stakes are as high as ever!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Deja Flay
programme.desc: Beat Bobby Flay winner Anne Burrell is ready to battle once again, but this time she'll have to cook against hotshot chef Marcus Samuelsson. Food Network's Scott Conant sits back and relaxes as his dream team takes center stage.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: BBF vs. Chopped
programme.desc: Chop chop Mr. Flay! Food Network's Ted Allen is turning the tables in Bobby Flay's kitchen and he's got the Chopped dream team to back him up.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Ghosts of Bobby's Past
programme.desc: Actress Laura Prepon and The Chew's Daphne Oz team up to get Bobby Flay beat. Bobby's protégée Leia Gaccione has a surprise in store for her old mentor, while New York restaurateur Einat Admony is out for redemption since her last match.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Extra Icing: 1, 2, 3 Delicious!
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman challenge the 11 young bakers to create assigned Neapolitan desserts featuring chocolate, strawberry and vanilla.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Sammy Whammy
programme.desc: It's the most anticipated episode of the season- dessert impostors! Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman challenge the remaining 10 bakers to create desserts that look like sandwiches.

programme.title: Challenge: Back to the Future Cakes

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Party Food

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Taverna
programme.desc: After visiting Nashville's replica of the Parthenon, Trisha Yearwood gets a hankering for Mediterranean food. She invites her niece, Ashley, over to help make stuffed collard greens, Greek fried cheese and beef moussaka.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Lunch With Aunt T
programme.desc: When Trisha Yearwood's niece Ashley first moved to Nashville, she would text Aunt T for recipe ideas and ways to make meals that last on a college student's budget. They're demonstrating these recipes and showing incredible ways to meal prep for the week.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Breaking Bread with Julie
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites her longtime friend, Julie, into the kitchen for a day celebrating all things bread. As they swap childhood bread-making stories, they create a tasty menu.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Feed a Firefighter

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: The Big Till

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cheap And Easy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has been stocking up for four make-ahead meals that are as cheap as they are easy to make. There's inexpensive slow cooker teriyaki ribs with quick slaw, Tex-Mex meatballs, BBQ chicken baked potatoes and a cheesy rigatoni pepper bake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Kitchen Confessional: The Other Men in My Life
programme.desc: Ree's sharing about the other men in her life and their favorite sweets, like her chocoholic dad and his love for Bartlesville cream pie. Her spirited brother-in-law never says no to her sweet and sour lollipops.

programme.title: Chopped Junior: Pizza Party
programme.desc: Amanda Freitag, Harley Morenstein and Anika Noni Rose preside over an all-pizza competition. Three courses of pizza begin with appetizers comprised of exotic looking mushrooms and a creamy Italian sauce.

programme.title: Chopped: Judges Face-Off

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: My Big Fat Greek Threesome
programme.desc: After Ben apologizes for shutting down Bryan and Tiffany’s fun, the crew prepares for their next charter hailing from Oklahoma. After hours, the charter guests seem to have a threesome in the jacuzzi and once again, Danny oversteps his boundaries.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Entrée-Vous
programme.desc: The crew must provide a romantic trip for new guests celebrating their seven-month dating anniversary. Bobby gets the green light to go after Julia, while Tiffany and Bryan get cozy in the hot tub. Meanwhile, Ben takes Hannah on a date.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Who's Got Game?
programme.desc: Hannah experiences the ultimate betrayal when Ben goes to the Captain about their galley miscommunication. After back-to-back charters, the Ionian Princess Crew finally enjoy a day off until Bryan decides to give Danny a lesson in dickie etiquette.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Charter King
programme.desc: Hannah’s migraine explodes when the bachelor charter guests bring back a large group of girls on board. Upon their exit, the bachelors anoint Danny as the charter MVP, much to the chagrin of Bobby and Bryan.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Fever Pitch
programme.desc: Hannah and Ben redefine their relationship while Bobby realizes he can't shut off his feelings for Julia after a flirty night with Hannah. After the crew pulls off a beach BBQ without a hitch, Ben is tasked with making American S'mores in Greece.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Charter From Heaven, Charter From Hell?
programme.desc: While Danny is away at the hospital, the crew revels in his absence. When Bryan confronts Jen on her ability to tie knots, she finally stands up to him. Meanwhile, Tiffany's feelings for Ben increase, while Bobby continues to be sidelined by Julia.

programme.desc: The bounty on Halstead's head becomes a serious reality as an innocent bartender takes a bullet meant for him. Olinsky tries to reason with Bembenek to call off the hit, while Voight and his team search for the hired assassin.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chicken, Dynamite, Chainsaw
programme.desc: Two teenage girls have gone missing, and the team knows the clock is ticking to find them. Halstead, Antonio and Lindsay investigate a tenement that gives them a much needed lead. Voight brings the father of one of the girls in to get some honest answers.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: An Honest Woman
programme.desc: While trying to help out Olive, Voight is attacked and kidnapped. When he does not show up for work, the team gets suspicious and begins investigating. Ruzek and Atwater prove they do belong on the team when they find a lead.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Prison Ball
programme.desc: The team goes undercover in a prison to gather information on the murder of a young girl.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Assignment of the Year
programme.desc: While Antonio continues his off-duty security job for Asher and Layla, Asher is killed. Voight works the case while making sure Antonio is covered and Halstead and Lindsay go undercover in a rather uncomfortable location.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Called in Dead
programme.desc: A friend of Nadia's leads the intelligence unit to a huge heroin bust. Unfortunately, this bust results in Olinksy arriving home to find his wife being held hostage.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Shouldn't Have Been Alone
programme.desc: With Burgess in the hospital after suffering gunshot wounds, the intelligence team is determined to find the people responsible. Lindsay delays her start so she can help with the case and the team takes turns watching over Burgess.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: We Don't Work Together Anymore
programme.desc: Lindsay has her first case with the task force and realizes she needs to call on Voight and her Intelligence Unit to assist. Meanwhile, Burgess is back at work and delegated to desk duty, allowing Platt to partner up with Roman.

programme.desc: For twenty years, NASA's Cassini spacecraft revealed the strange secrets of Saturn until it vaporized in its atmosphere in a blaze of glory. Today its legacy lives on, as fresh data from the probe helps scientists make brand-new discoveries.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Finding the New Earth
programme.desc: New discoveries have revealed thousands of exoplanets beyond our solar system, and some resemble earth enough that one could be a new home for humanity. But even with cutting-edge technology, finding the perfect one is the scientific challenge of the age.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Search for a Second Earth

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Cassini's Final Secrets

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Female Forces: Ready to Rumble
programme.desc: The women of Naperville PD show just how tough they are as they combat out of control suspects including a kid who tries to charge one of the officers and a mother with a violent daughter seeking advice.

programme.title: Body Cam: My Name is Death
programme.desc: Officers confront a knife-wielding suspect. In Florida, a man who flees into the woods is outsmarted by a K9 Officer. In Indiana, a gunman wages war on police, caught on surveillance cameras, until SWAT closes in.

programme.title: Body Cam: 90 Minutes
programme.desc: Police pursue a father and son, plus, an officer's life changes when he comes face-to-face with an armed suspect.

programme.title: Body Cam: Code 30
programme.desc: In New York state, a domestic disturbance takes a violent turn which changes a police chief's life. In Florida an officer chasing 2 suspects is separated from his K9. And in Indiana, an Officer stares down the barrel of a suspect's gun.

programme.title: Body Cam: Hunted
programme.desc: In Texas police set a trap for a would-be killer. Officers put a plan into action, and Body Cam reveals a deadly plot. In Florida, a high-speed chase leads police into a dangerous swamp. But when a K9 locates the suspect, the arrest turns into a rescue.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Motor City Murder
programme.desc: In 1970's Detroit, a senseless murder rocks the African-American neighbourhood of the North End. Police think they've got the perpetrators and a jury agrees. But it will take 47 years for the truth to finally emerge and right history's wrongs.

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez: An ID Murder Mystery: The Boy From Bristol
programme.desc: When a friend of Aaron Hernandez is found dead near his home, investigators turn their gaze on the New England Patriot. At trial, a sensational family drama unfolds as Aaron fights for his life. Later, links to another brutal slaying emerge.

programme.title: Mystery on the Mississippi
programme.desc: A parent's worst nightmare is realized when the body of an 11-year-old is found 130 miles away from home, dumped along the icy banks of the Mississippi. Fear spreads across the region as the community grapples with the unspeakable crime.

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez: An ID Murder Mystery: The Boy From Bristol
programme.desc: When a friend of Aaron Hernandez is found dead near his home, investigators turn their gaze on the New England Patriot. At trial, a sensational family drama unfolds as Aaron fights for his life. Later, links to another brutal slaying emerge.

programme.title: Mystery on the Mississippi
programme.desc: A parent's worst nightmare is realized when the body of an 11-year-old is found 130 miles away from home, dumped along the icy banks of the Mississippi. Fear spreads across the region as the community grapples with the unspeakable crime.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Motor City Murder
programme.desc: In 1970's Detroit, a senseless murder rocks the African-American neighbourhood of the North End. Police think they've got the perpetrators and a jury agrees. But it will take 47 years for the truth to finally emerge and right history's wrongs.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Never Coming Home
programme.desc: A mother and her two young sons vanish in rural Wyoming, prompting a nationwide search. Leads dry up and the case goes cold... until a dark secret is revealed, leading investigators to another homicide they had no clue could solve four murders.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Sick and Twisted
programme.desc: Dana MacKay is found viciously beaten to death while her husband is out of town. One suspect comes to mind: a woman who's been stalking Dana for the last month. But it will take a cellphone with X-rated text messages to unravel this mystery.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Mississippi Mayhem
programme.desc: Greg May, 56, is getting ready to move to Florida with a new girlfriend when he vanishes without a trace. Police aren't sure if the tattoo artist turned Civil War collector is alive or dead until their investigation uncovers a horrific plot.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Dream Home
programme.desc: A Peruvian immigrant is discovered murdered and police have to ask could there be more to the American success story than meets the eye.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Crime Writer
programme.desc: Brook Baker, a college journalism major, dreamt of becoming an investigative reporter. When the popular co-ed is brutally murdered while researching a controversial article, the police must sort through hundreds of suspects to find her killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Fallen
programme.desc: When a pastor loses two wives in suspicious accidents, authorities wonder: was it terrible luck ... or murder?

programme.title: Dateline: Without a Trace
programme.desc: When 29-year-old Carrie Olson doesn’t show up for work and is reported missing, an entire community pulls together in the search. Detectives suspect foul play and soon focus their investigation on two men in her life.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: When beautiful young mother Danielle Jennings is found strangled to death in her apartment, detectives immediately believe she knew her attacker -- until a witness comes forward with a ringer of a clue that leads them to an unthinkable monster.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Apartment 23
programme.desc: With graduation nearing at Northeastern University, students are alarmed at the discovery of a fellow co-ed shot to death in her apartment. Detectives face many challenges in the investigation until they realize the answer is right in front of them.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: A storm rattles the night in Key Largo, Florida, as an intruder slips silently into the home of newlyweds Michael and Missy MacIvor. As daylight clears away the rain, a nightmare is revealed that will haunt the entire community for years to come.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Too Close to Home
programme.desc: The New England chills of the New Year bite even more brutally when a mother and daughter are savagely murdered in their Woburn, MA home. With several suspects on the line, detectives take a shot in the dark in order to solve this nightmare of a mystery.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone
programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Hard Target
programme.desc: FutureWeapons tests inflatable armour, the revolutionary shoulder fired grenades that double the range of weapons, the latest generation of the A10 Thunderbolt ground attack planes and the assault rifle round that stays supersonic out to 1200 yards.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Firepower
programme.desc: In this action packed episode we see the secret device that will tear apart terrorist bombs; the new squad weapon that will get you out of an ambush; the latest surface to air missile and the US Army's latest sniper rifle.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Guns
programme.desc: A rapid-fire cannon that's becoming a hit with the US military; the personal defence weapon that has the same knockdown as bigger guns, the Gatling gun that rains fire on target and the new multi-calibre assault weapon.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Close Protection
programme.desc: A look at a top secret device that stops terrorists from smuggling weapons onto planes, the newest multi-caliber combat weapon, the latest naval gun and one of the deadliest close quarter weapons.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Future Warrior
programme.desc: An assault riffle that can be converted into a sniper riffle is examined.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Taking It to the Finish Line
programme.desc: Chase and the team are hired to finish a cabin for a homeowner that's been collecting materials for years but just hasn't been able to finish the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Six Weeks For Two A-Frames
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate two A-Frames in Sugarloaf Valley. With only six weeks to accomplish both renovations, Chase splits the team down the middle. A friendly wager allows the winning team to dress the losing team up at dinner.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned cabins buried deep in the woods. They'll give these properties the facelift they've needed for decades. And you never know what you might find.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Dixie Dog Den
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters team helps their own Matthew Dix restore his grandfather's old shed to its former glory.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Cabin Overhaul
programme.desc: It's a Cabin Masters conundrum as Chase and the team are challenged to take a former garage and turn it into a home that will comfortably accommodate six siblings and their seventeen kids.

programme.desc: Bug and the gang are tasked with one of the most dangerous salvage projects to date: bringing down a structure without damaging the building it's attached to.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Colorado Contemporary Deck
programme.desc: The crew has a $350,000 budget for a contemporary-style mega deck with a curved hand-cut stone fireplace, a pergola and a pizza oven. Building outdoors in winter subjects the crew to dangerous icy conditions and an oversight threatens the pergola build.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Triple Threat Deck With a Pool
programme.desc: The team builds their biggest and most expensive masterpiece over four months on a $750,000 budget. Big problems start after finishing the deck, when freezing temperatures put an indefinite hold on finishing the pool.

programme.title: Mega Decks: The Ultimate Luxury Deck with a Two-Story Waterfall
programme.desc: A couple challenges the crew to build a deck that maximizes their gorgeous views, and adds 1000 square feet of outdoor living space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Scenic Overlook With a Private Deck
programme.desc: The team plans to create a large enclosed space that homeowners can enjoy throughout the year. As a retaining wall is uncovered, the plans for expansion come into question. They also battle cold, icy terrain and a 25-foot cliff.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Log Cabin Luxe
programme.desc: To help this tiny deck achieve mega status, massive 40-foot-long Western red cedar logs are trucked in from Canada. The finished product has a three-tier pizza oven, a six-foot gas fire rail, and extra tall glass panels.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dream Deck With a Cozy Feel
programme.desc: Garth and the team face a huge challenge transforming a rickety, unsafe deck into a two-story masterpiece with a stone kitchen and bar, fire and water features and a spiral staircase.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dramatic Cliffside Triple Deck
programme.desc: Transforming this home's 20 year old deck into a mega deck requires a complete demo and rebuild. Plans include redoing a kids' play deck and a master bedroom deck. The challenge is that the property sits on the side of a cliff with a 40 foot drop.

programme.title: Mega Decks: In Garth We Trust
programme.desc: A half-finished deck means a call for Garth to deliver the deck of one couples dreams. But to make their dream work, he needs to cut down a few trees, which the owners are unsure of.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Fireside Retreat With a Rustic Feel
programme.desc: The team tears down a dilapidated and useless deck to make room for a $200,000 rustic retreat. Even with design changes and delayed materials, they're able to create a space with a fireplace, skylights, a fire pit, and rustic accents.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Home Gets a Two-Story Cliffside Deck
programme.desc: Mark loves his cliffside log home in the Rocky Mountains, but the small existing deck doesn't take advantage of the million-dollar view.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Nisswa Cabin
programme.desc: When a family's inherited 60-year-old lakeside cabin needs updating and more room for gatherings, the brothers blow out the back wall to take over the huge porch.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Lakeside Scenic Porch Redo
programme.desc: Chase and Brock transform an uninviting, rarely used porch into a warm and rustic family gathering space. They add reclaimed barn wood to the ceiling, rough-sawn hardwood flooring and a huge sliding door looking toward the lake.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Quonset Hut to Guest House
programme.desc: The guys use reclaimed materials to create bright and functional guest quarters in the dark, unsafe storage space of a World War II Quonset hut. The sleeping area features custom beds, and the kitchen is build out with butcher block countertops.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Open Concept Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and Brock transform a 1950s cabin to give a family the entertaining space they've always wanted. They remove paneling and knock down walls to create an open kitchen. They replace old carpet with new flooring that's perfect for going barefoot.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Time Capsule Cabin
programme.desc: Brock and Chase update a fourth-generation family cabin on Lake Charlotte, Minnesota. They give one room a bigger feel with new paint and a custom barn wood-framed window, and a breakfast nook adds a great space for family gatherings.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Rustic on the River
programme.desc: Brock and Chase tackle an old river cabin and transform the living space with timber beams, wood floors and a custom entertainment center. Then, a wood slat wall defines the space and is accented by a walnut kitchen island with hand wrought metal legs.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Retro To Rustic
programme.desc: Brock and Chase gut a lakeside retro guesthouse and give it a floor-to-ceiling rustic overhaul. They replace laminate flooring with wood, make a custom live-edge kitchen island and add a custom door frame to the main room.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Cozy Traditional Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and Brock transform a lackluster family cabin by giving it a beautiful open floor plan. The living room, dining room and kitchen come alive when the brothers add a center island with handmade wooden stools and ceiling beams to look like timber.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: By the Sea
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the best seafood by the seashore. Whether it's baked, broiled, fried or served in a shell or on a bun, these fresh-out-of-the-water wonders have hungry diners wishing they were seeing waves.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Desserts to Die For
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the most delectable, distinctive and to-die-for dessert dishes around. They have the power to take diners back in time, back home or even to places they've never been before.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: The Whole Hog
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes hog-wild all day with dishes that use every single part of the pig. Simple strips of bacon for breakfast just won't do, and forget about basic barbecue. These are the perfect porky portions for an entire day of pigging out.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Superstuffed
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shares a day's worth of foods that are jam-packed, crammed full and super stuffed with the tastiest, most delicious flavors imaginable.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Savannah, GA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels down to Georgia to taste some the Savannah's best fried chicken, low country seafood boil and a four-pound pulled pork sandwich known only as the Pigzilla.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charleston, SC
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. He takes on the belt buster challenge where he must consume a two-pound burger, three pounds of nachos, a hulking order of tater tots and a 12-ounce milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Layers Of Goodness
programme.desc: Get ready to pile it on thick as we're talking layers of goodness that are stacked to the ceiling. We take a trip to Chicago where we meet up with Jeff Mauro to discover all the magic colors hidden inside the rainbow cake.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Hole Truth (Donuts)
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes us on a trip to Memphis to honor the original glazed doughnut that started it all.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stretchy Pants Required
programme.desc: America's best dishes just might burst your buttons. Anne Burrell faces off against a gut-busting club sandwich from Little Goat Diner in Chicago while Antonia Lofaso ventures to the heart of Los Angeles for heavy-hitting Korean barbecue at Park's BBQ.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Borrowed Favourites
programme.desc: Sharing is caring, and the treats that family and friends love become personal favourites too! Robert Irvine takes his wife's advice and discovers the world's greatest omelet at Babystacks Cafe in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: Good Eats: Hittin' the Sauce II
programme.desc: No matter how good of a cook you are, sooner or later your seafood is going to let you down. Alton Brown has the sauces that will save your dinner every time.

programme.desc: Eggs Benedict is king of the brunch, so Alton rebuilds a 'Good Eats' version.

programme.desc: Learn everything you need to know about porterhouses.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: The Pacific Coast Highway
programme.desc: Katie Lee is hitting California's famed Pacific Coast Highway to find delicious, international beach food in a beautiful coastal setting. In Monterey, she discovers rich Italian influences in cioppino with local Dungeness crab.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Tybee Island
programme.desc: Katie Lee heads to Tybee Island, Georgia, a barrier island just 18 miles southeast of culinary Mecca Savannah. The small island is full of big flavors, and Katie starts her exploration with perfectly sweet local shrimp and a spicy blackened fish hoagie.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: The Bahamas

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-charged!/ Super-charged: Mickey's Monster Rally
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake super-charges Mickey's roadster, giving it super-speed and a few surprises. Mickey and the gang must chase after Pete's truck, which was accidentally transformed into a Monster Truck.

programme.title: Bluey: Keepy Uppy / Magic Xylophone / Shadowlands
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the house with a balloon; Bluey and Bingo argue over a magic xylophone; Bluey, Coco and Snickers play a game called Shadowlands.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: One Small Ruff for Pup-kind / The Lost Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: The pups head to Space Camp to give a dog toy to Chloe; The pups get help to find their bouncy ball.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Kitty/ Polly Wants a Pug
programme.desc: When Bob brings home a lost kitty, Bing and Rolly try find her a home. While in Florida, Bingo and Rolly search for an old friend of Bob's.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Pigs and Pugs/ Bob Loves Mona
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Coco Bill/ Brothers and Sisters
programme.desc: When Rugo tries to collect all of the coconuts in Cretacia, Bill sets out to get them back! Tiny and Totor discover they have a lot in common.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: The Big Mean Green / How Giganto Got His Roar
programme.desc: The Dinos try to prove Gigantos innocence after the lake gets damaged.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Billy Beagle's Tip-Top Garage/ Diner Dog Rescue
programme.desc: Billy Beagle films the garage crew as they try to turn a junker into a winning roadster in one day. The Happy Helpers help a TV chef rescue the Hot Dog Diner.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Impossible Race/ The Happiest Helpers Cruise!
programme.desc: Cuckoo Loca enters her first Roadster event. Then, the happy helpers become cruise directors on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Chin Up, Pups / The Wind Beneath My Paws
programme.desc: The Pugs make a hospitalized child's wish come true; The Pugs search for Bob's Gift.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Take Romeo Off the Road/Mission: PJ Seeker
programme.desc: The PJ Masks gets locked in the Lab and it's up to PJ Robot to rescue them! Gekko is on the case when animals keep disappearing from the city.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Wheels of a Hero / Moonwolfy
programme.desc: Armadylan steals the PJ Masks' vehicles. Kevin turns full wolfy on a trip to the moon.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Slam the Door/ JAILBREAK!

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Artsy Smartsy/ The Crush
programme.desc: Theodore helps Simon to try and get past his perfectionism in order to complete an art assignment for art class. Simon has a crush on the babysitter and secretly prepares a romantic dinner while Theodore keeps Alvin distracted.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The C Team/ Father Daughter Dance
programme.desc: Coach Dobkins challenges Miss Smith and her ragtag team of outcasts to a baseball game to see who's the best. The Chipettes each want Dave to be their date to the 'Father Daughter Dance.'

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Alvin's Wild Weekend/ For Whom the Bell Tolls
programme.desc: Alvin begs Dave to spend a weekend alone with him. A hypnotist accidentally turns Simon into a bumbling fool before an academic contest.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Girly Squirrely/ Birthday Battle
programme.desc: Catman thinks that Timmy has been kidnapped. Timmy wishes that his dad was mayor.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Weirdos on a Train/ Tons of Timmys
programme.desc: Dad and Crocker make a deal. As a result, Crocker becomes best friends with Dinkerberg. Timmy wishes up 5,000 Timmys for the Planet of the Dads. The Timmys kidnap Wanda and Cosmo.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Crockin' the House/ Tardy Sauce
programme.desc: Mrs. Crocker leaves Mr. Crocker home alone for the first time, so he calls on Timmy to teach him how to have fun. Chloe wants to break the attendance record, but Timmy tells her school is canceled and drags her to a taco stand.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: World Day/ Allergic Reaction
programme.desc: The Chipmunks represent countries for a school presentation; Theodore develops an allergy to an unknown ingredient.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simon/ Canary

programme.title: It's Pony: Nosy Pony/ Beatrice
programme.desc: When Annie tries to stop Pony from being nosy, she creates a bigger problem that puts him in danger. When Annie takes pity on a lonely friend and lets her spend the day with Pony, she worries her friend is better at taking care of Pony than she is.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Not Normal/ Gone

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pest of the West
programme.desc: SpongeBob discovers that he was related to the great Western hero, SpongeBuck.

programme.desc: When Krusty Krab starts a new promotion in honour of the Vikings, SpongeBob sets out to learn all he can about this civilization.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Pteranodon't!
